elements.original_description: A simple cartoon figure with a puzzled expression, holding a magnifying glass, standing on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a simple cartoon figure with a puzzled expression, holding a magnifying glass, standing on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. Cinematic lighting with subtle curiosity and introspection in mood, sharp focus.
